name: Send quote PDFs from form submissions and follow up automatically

parameters.content:
## Delay and follow up

Waits for the configured follow-up period, then sends an automatic follow-up email referencing the quote number.

## Prepare and send quote

Converts the generated PDF into a file attachment and emails the quote to the customer within seconds of the request.

## Generate quote document

Builds the quote HTML from the submitted details and configured values, then the Acrewity node renders it to PDF.

## Capture quote details

Collects the quote request through the built-in form and applies workflow-wide settings such as company name, sender name, quote validity, and follow-up timing.

## Send quote PDFs from form submissions and follow up automatically

### Who's it for

Freelancers, agencies, and service businesses that receive quote requests and lose deals by replying late or forgetting to follow up.

### How it works

A prospect fills out the built-in n8n form (no external form tool needed). The workflow builds a professional quote with a quote number and validity date, renders it to PDF with the Acrewity community node, and emails it to the prospect via Gmail within seconds. After a configurable delay (default 3 days) a polite follow-up email referencing the quote number goes out automatically.

### Setup steps

1. Install the verified community node `@acrewity/n8n-nodes-acrewity` and add your Acrewity API credential (free key at acrewity.com, 100 free credits/month)
2. Connect your Gmail credential to both email nodes
3. Edit Set Configuration Parameters: company name, sender name, quote validity, follow-up delay
4. Activate the workflow and share the form URL shown on the trigger node

### Customization

Edit the form fields in the trigger, the quote look in Create Quote HTML (the editable lines are marked CHANGE ME), and both email texts in the Gmail nodes. Add an If node before the follow-up to skip prospects who already replied, or a CRM node after it to log the lead.

parameters.formDescription: Tell us what you need and we will send you a quote within minutes.

assignments.name: hourlyRateNote
assignments.value: Final pricing is confirmed after a short scoping call.

parameters.subject: =Your quote {{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }} from {{ $('Set Configuration Parameters').first().json.companyName }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.customerName }},

Thanks for reaching out. Your quote {{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }} is attached as a PDF and is valid until {{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.validUntil }}.

Reply to this email with any questions — happy to adjust the scope.

Best regards,
{{ $('Set Configuration Parameters').first().json.senderName }}

parameters.subject: =Following up on quote {{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }}
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.customerName }},

Just checking in on the quote I sent a few days ago ({{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.quoteNumber }}). It is valid until {{ $('Create Quote HTML').item.json.validUntil }}.

If anything about the scope or pricing does not fit, tell me what would work better and I will revise it.

Best regards,
{{ $('Set Configuration Parameters').first().json.senderName }}
